street.description: Place where the corporation was originally organized — used by §981-A re-recital filings to certify historical organization. State is implicit ('State of Maine' is hardcoded text on the form). Distinct from entity.current_address (current location) and entity.principal_office.* (modern formation address).

city.description: Place where the corporation was originally organized — used by §981-A re-recital filings to certify historical organization. State is implicit ('State of Maine' is hardcoded text on the form). Distinct from entity.current_address (current location) and entity.principal_office.* (modern formation address).

day.description: Date of original organization, split into three widgets (day/month/year) rather than a single ISO date because the form composes the recital sentence with three separate blanks ('on the X day of Y, Z').

month.description: Date of original organization, split into three widgets (day/month/year) rather than a single ISO date because the form composes the recital sentence with three separate blanks ('on the X day of Y, Z').

year.description: Date of original organization, split into three widgets (day/month/year) rather than a single ISO date because the form composes the recital sentence with three separate blanks ('on the X day of Y, Z').

original_name.description: The original (founding) name of the corporation at inception. Distinct from entity.name (current name, SECOND recital) and from entity.name_history[N].name (intermediate names). On MNP-981A this field has two physical widgets (981a17 line 1, 981a18 line 2) to accommodate long original names — both bind the same canonical key.

original_purpose.description: Free-text description of the corporation's original purpose at incorporation. Singular per MNPCA-6's `entity.public_benefit_purpose` / `entity.mutual_benefit_purpose` convention, even though the form text reads 'purposes' (plural).

management_structure.description: 13-B MRSA management-structure enum: 'directors' (including trustees, governors, managers, etc.) or 'members'. Single canonical key backed by two physical checkboxes in a one-of-N radio group (SEVENTH on MNP-981A).

street.description: Where the existing corporation is now located. Includes county (atypical for modern address blocks — county is required by the §981-A recital text). State is implicit ('State of Maine' hardcoded). Distinct from registered_office and principal_office addresses on formation forms.

city.description: Where the existing corporation is now located. Includes county (atypical for modern address blocks — county is required by the §981-A recital text). State is implicit ('State of Maine' hardcoded). Distinct from registered_office and principal_office addresses on formation forms.

county.description: Where the existing corporation is now located. Includes county (atypical for modern address blocks — county is required by the §981-A recital text). State is implicit ('State of Maine' hardcoded). Distinct from registered_office and principal_office addresses on formation forms.

officer_count.description: Numeric count of officers stated on the NINTH recital. Should match the populated officer_<role>.name slots in the same recital. Stand-alone integer, not derived (the form asks the filer to state it explicitly).

nonprofit_type.description: Whether the nonprofit is organized as a public-benefit corporation or a mutual-benefit corporation under 13-B MRSA. Enum: 'public_benefit' | 'mutual_benefit'.

name.description: Extension of the existing officer_<role>.{name,address} fixed-role roster pattern (NP_MNP-9 documented officer_president, officer_treasurer, officer_secretary, officer_clerk). MNP-981A adds officer_vice_president.name as a slot.

printed_name.description: Per-role signer pattern for forms with two fixed-role signature slots (e.g., President + Secretary/Clerk on MNP-981A). Distinct from filing.signer.* (single abstract filer) and from merger/consolidation.parties[N].signature_block.signer_{1,2}.* (per-party in merger filings). Roles observed: filing.signer_president.printed_name, filing.signer_secretary.printed_name. Combine with the existing officer_<role>.* roster to identify which sitting officers are also signers.

Per-role signer pattern for forms with two fixed-role signature slots (e.g., President + Secretary/Clerk on MNP-981A). Distinct from filing.signer.* (single abstract filer) and from merger/consolidation.parties[N].signature_block.signer_{1,2}.* (per-party in merger filings). Roles observed: filing.signer_president.printed_name, filing.signer_secretary.printed_name. Combine with the existing officer_<role>.* roster to identify which sitting officers are also signers.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
